decisions.rationale: Optimizing for recall + precision + top5_accuracy to ensure real-world exam relevance.
Prevents 1-minute timeout blockers during generation by actively pinging port 11434 and silently spawning ollama serve via CREATE_NO_WINDOW if unresponsive.

next_action: Resume UAT validation and close out Phase 3 MVP Refactoring tasks.
context_notes: We successfully patched 5 critical reliability issues (calibration, deduplication, testing, drift detection, and missing ollama autostart). The loop test effectively validated memory usage and stability over large document payloads.
